objective: Review and redesign quiz items so the instrument remains technically serious while becoming less overly technical, more interesting, and more accessible to casual respondents.
acceptance_criteria: Identify item types that are too technical or low-fun for the target audience.
Propose a revised item strategy that preserves measurement validity while adding accessible, scenario-based, culturally legible, or playful content.
Record which existing items should be kept, rewritten, softened, or replaced before implementation.
